```{r}
                    ~ if_else(Total_Immune_Ref > 0 & !is.na(Total_Immune_Ref), 
                              .x / Total_Immune_Ref, NA_real_),
                    .names = "{.col}_norm"))
    immune_cols <- paste0(cols_norm, "_norm")
  } else {
    combined_norm <- combined
    immune_cols   <- NULL
  }
  
  lvl_dir <- file.path(out_root, level_name)
  dir.create(lvl_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  # ── MASTER RUNNER ──
  run_master_vars <- function(df, cols, prefix) {
    if(length(cols) == 0) return()
    
    # A. GLOBAL METS / STAGE
    plot_panel_safe(df, cols, "mets_cat", "Mets_3Level", paste0(prefix, "_Mets_3Level"), lvl_dir)
    plot_panel_safe(df, cols, "any_mets_bin", "AnyMets", paste0(prefix, "_AnyMets_Binary"), lvl_dir)
    plot_panel_safe(df, cols, "M_Stage", "MStage", paste0(prefix, "_M0_vs_M1"), lvl_dir)
    plot_panel_safe(df, cols, "MLH1_status", "MLH1", paste0(prefix, "_MLH1"), lvl_dir)
    
    # B. MLH1 STRATIFIED
    plot_panel_safe(filter(df, MLH1_status == "MLH1 Intact"), cols, "mets_cat", "MSS", paste0(prefix, "_Mets_IntactOnly"), lvl_dir)
    plot_panel_safe(filter(df, MLH1_status == "MLH1 Deficient"), cols, "mets_cat", "MSI", paste0(prefix, "_Mets_DeficientOnly"), lvl_dir)
    
    # C. GRADE
    plot_panel_safe(df, cols, "Grade", "Grade_All", paste0(prefix, "_Grade_All"), lvl_dir)
    plot_panel_safe(filter(df, mets_cat=="No Mets"), cols, "Grade", "Grade_NoMets", paste0(prefix, "_Grade_in_NoMets"), lvl_dir)
    plot_panel_safe(filter(df, any_mets_bin!="No Mets"), cols, "Grade", "Grade_Mets", paste0(prefix, "_Grade_in_Mets"), lvl_dir)
    
    # D. NODE STAGE
    plot_panel_safe(filter(df, any_mets_bin!="No Mets"), cols, "node_stage_clean", "Node_Mets", paste0(prefix, "_Node_in_Mets"), lvl_dir)
    plot_panel_safe(filter(df, mets_cat=="Distant Mets"), cols, "node_stage_clean", "Node_DistMets", paste0(prefix, "_Node_in_DistantMets"), lvl_dir)
    
    # E. SIDE
    plot_panel_safe(df, cols, "side", "Side_All", paste0(prefix, "_Side_All"), lvl_dir)
    plot_panel_safe(filter(df, mets_cat=="No Mets"), cols, "side", "Side_NoMets", paste0(prefix, "_Side_in_NoMets"), lvl_dir)
    plot_panel_safe(filter(df, any_mets_bin!="No Mets"), cols, "side", "Side_Mets", paste0(prefix, "_Side_in_Mets"), lvl_dir)
  }

  if(!is.null(immune_cols)) {
    msg("  -> Generating Immune Plots (Normalized)...")
    run_master_vars(combined_norm, immune_cols, "IMMUNE")
  }
  if(length(cols_raw) > 0) {
    msg("  -> Generating Structural Plots (Raw)...")
    run_master_vars(combined_norm, cols_raw, "STRUCTURAL")
  }
}

msg("\n✅ Analysis Complete. All 14 comparison sets generated per level.")
```


Comparisons for site that were the most significant
```{r}
###############################################################################
#  Fig1_DH_AllCells_AllPossibleSitePairs_FIXED.R
#  "Brute Force" Discovery Mode
#  FIXED: Prevents 'Tumor.x/Tumor.y' collision by cleaning reference dataframes.
#  Author: Alos Diallo (Assisted by Gemini)
###############################################################################

## ── PATHS & SETUP ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
path_dh_epic_v1  <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/idats/"
path_dh_epic_v2  <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/25_samples/"
path_dh_meta_csv <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv"
out_root         <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results/Figure1/Site_Specific_Comparisons"

dir.create(out_root, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(minfi); library(sesame); library(ENmix)
  library(HiTIMED); library(EpiDISH); library(tidyverse); 
  library(ggpubr); library(rstatix); library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
})

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "] ", ..., "\n")

## ── 1. LEVEL DEFINITIONS (Strict Mapping) ───────────────────────────────────
get_level_defs <- function(h) {
  if (h == 1) {
    return(list(norm = c(), raw  = c("Tumor", "Other")))
  } else if (h == 2) {
    return(list(norm = c(), raw  = c("Tumor", "Immune", "Angiogenic")))
  } else if (h == 3) {
    return(list(norm = c(), raw  = c("Tumor", "Lymphocyte", "Myeloid", "Endothelial", "Epithelial", "Stromal")))
  } else if (h == 4) {
    return(list(
      norm = c("Granulocyte", "Mononuclear", "Tcell", "Bcell", "NK"),
      raw  = c("Tumor", "Endothelial", "Epithelial", "Stromal")
    ))
  } else if (h == 5) {
    return(list(
      norm = c("Bas", "Eos", "Neu", "Mono", "DC", "Bnv", "Bmem", "CD4T", "CD8T", "NK"),
      raw  = c("Tumor", "Endothelial", "Epithelial", "Stromal")
    ))
  } else if (h == 6) {
    return(list(
      norm = c("Bnv", "Bmem", "CD4nv", "CD4mem", "Treg", "CD8nv", "CD8mem", 
               "Mono", "DC", "NK", "Bas", "Eos", "Neu"),
      raw  = c("Tumor", "Endothelial", "Epithelial", "Stromal")
    ))
  }
}

## ── 2. DATA LOADING & METADATA ──────────────────────────────────────────────
read_beta_DH <- function() {
  msg("Reading DH IDATs...")
  rg1 <- read.metharray.exp(path_dh_epic_v1, recursive = TRUE, force = TRUE, extended = TRUE)
  rg2 <- read.metharray.exp(path_dh_epic_v2, recursive = TRUE, force = TRUE, extended = TRUE)
  msg("NOOB Normalization...")
  beta1 <- getBeta(preprocessNoob(rg1, dyeMethod = "single"))
  beta2 <- getBeta(preprocessNoob(rg2, dyeMethod = "single")) %>% sesame::betasCollapseToPfx()
  common <- intersect(rownames(beta1), rownames(beta2))
  beta   <- cbind(beta1[common, ], beta2[common, ])
  msg("Running ENmix QC...")
  bad <- union(ENmix::QCinfo(rg1)$badCpG, ENmix::QCinfo(rg2)$badCpG)
  anno <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
  sex_cpgs <- rownames(anno)[anno$chr %in% c("chrX","chrY")]
  beta <- beta[setdiff(rownames(beta), union(bad, sex_cpgs)), ]
  msg(paste("Final Beta Matrix:", nrow(beta), "CpGs x", ncol(beta), "Samples"))
  return(beta)
}

if (!exists("DH_beta")) DH_beta <- read_beta_DH()

msg("Processing Metadata...")
meta_raw <- read_csv(path_dh_meta_csv, show_col_types = FALSE)

meta_DH <- meta_raw %>%
  mutate(
    SampleID = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep = "_"),
    site_clean = str_to_title(site),
    site_clean = case_when(
        site_clean == "Sigmoid Colon" ~ "Sigmoid",
        TRUE ~ site_clean
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(SampleID %in% colnames(DH_beta)) %>%
  dplyr::select(SampleID, site_clean)

# ── AUTO-DETECT PAIRS ──
valid_sites <- meta_DH %>% 
  count(site_clean) %>% 
  filter(n >= 2) %>% 
  pull(site_clean)

msg(paste("Found", length(valid_sites), "sites with N>=2:", paste(valid_sites, collapse=", ")))

all_pairs <- t(combn(valid_sites, 2))
colnames(all_pairs) <- c("Site_A", "Site_B")
site_pairs <- as_tibble(all_pairs)

msg(paste("Generated", nrow(site_pairs), "unique site pairwise comparisons."))


## ── 3. REFERENCE GENERATION ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
msg("Generating References...")
h2_res <- HiTIMED_deconvolution(DH_beta, "COAD", 2, "tumor")

# FIX: Select ONLY the reference column we need to avoid collisions with "Tumor" later
h2_df  <- as.data.frame(h2_res) %>% 
          rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% 
          dplyr::rename(Total_Immune_Ref = Immune) %>%
          dplyr::select(SampleID, Total_Immune_Ref) # <--- STRICT SELECTION

data("centEpiFibIC.m", package = "EpiDISH", envir = environment())
common_cpg <- intersect(rownames(DH_beta), rownames(centEpiFibIC.m))
fib_res <- epidish(DH_beta[common_cpg, ], centEpiFibIC.m[common_cpg, ], "RPC")$estF
fib_df  <- as.data.frame(fib_res) %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% 
          dplyr::select(SampleID, Fib)

## ── 4. MAIN LOOP (LEVELS 1-6) ───────────────────────────────────────────────
msg("======= Starting Comprehensive Pairwise Analysis =======")

for (h in 1:6) {
  level_name <- paste0("h", h)
  msg("\n>>> Processing Level:", level_name)
  
  # A. Deconvolution
  res <- HiTIMED_deconvolution(DH_beta, "COAD", h, "tumor")
  if (is.vector(res)) {
    frac_df <- data.frame(SampleID = names(res), res = res)
    names(frac_df)[2] <- paste0("Cell_h", h)
  } else {
    frac_df <- as.data.frame(res) %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID")
  }

  # B. Merge
  # Join structure ensures clean names
  combined <- meta_DH %>%
    inner_join(h2_df, by="SampleID") %>%
    inner_join(fib_df, by="SampleID") %>%
    inner_join(frac_df, by="SampleID")
  
  # C. Identify Cells & Definitions
  present_cols <- setdiff(names(frac_df), "SampleID")
  defs         <- get_level_defs(h)
  cols_norm    <- intersect(present_cols, defs$norm)
  cols_raw     <- intersect(present_cols, defs$raw)
  if (h >= 3) cols_raw <- unique(c(cols_raw, "Fib")) # Always add Fib from h3+
  
  all_target_cells <- c(cols_norm, cols_raw)
  
  # Create Output Directory
  lvl_dir <- file.path(out_root, level_name)
  dir.create(lvl_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  msg(paste("   Plotting", length(all_target_cells), "cell types x", nrow(site_pairs), "pairs..."))

  # D. Loop through ALL Cells
  for(cell in all_target_cells) {
    
    is_immune <- cell %in% cols_norm
    
    # E. Loop through ALL Site Pairs
    for(i in 1:nrow(site_pairs)) {
      site_a <- site_pairs$Site_A[i]
      site_b <- site_pairs$Site_B[i]
      
      # Prepare Data (Safe if() for normalization)
      plot_data <- combined %>%
        filter(site_clean %in% c(site_a, site_b)) %>%
        dplyr::rename(Raw_Prop = all_of(cell)) %>%
        mutate(site_clean = factor(site_clean, levels = c(site_a, site_b)))
      
      if(is_immune) {
        plot_data$Final_Prop <- ifelse(plot_data$Total_Immune_Ref > 0, 
                                       plot_data$Raw_Prop / plot_data$Total_Immune_Ref, 
                                       NA)
      } else {
        plot_data$Final_Prop <- plot_data$Raw_Prop
      }
      
      plot_data <- plot_data %>% filter(!is.na(Final_Prop))
      
      # N Check (Min 2)
      n_a <- sum(plot_data$site_clean == site_a)
      n_b <- sum(plot_data$site_clean == site_b)
      
      if(n_a < 2 || n_b < 2) next # Skip insufficient data
      
      # Plot
      file_suffix <- if(is_immune) "_norm" else ""
      plot_title  <- paste0(cell, file_suffix)
      y_label     <- if(is_immune) "Prop (Norm)" else "Prop (Raw)"
      
      p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = site_clean, y = Final_Prop, fill = site_clean)) +
        geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.5, alpha = 0.8, color = "gray30") +
        geom_jitter(width = 0.1, size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6) +
        stat_compare_means(method = "wilcox.test", 
                           label = "p.format", size = 5, 
                           comparisons = list(c(site_a, site_b))) + 
        scale_fill_manual(values = c("#377EB8", "#E41A1C")) +
        theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
        theme(
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          legend.position = "none",
          plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
          panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
        ) +
        labs(y = y_label, title = plot_title)
      
      safe_a <- gsub(" ", "", site_a)
      safe_b <- gsub(" ", "", site_b)
      fname  <- paste0("BOX_", cell, file_suffix, "_", safe_a, "_vs_", safe_b, ".pdf")
      
      ggsave(file.path(lvl_dir, fname), p, width = 3.5, height = 5, device = cairo_pdf)
    }
  }
}

msg("\n✅ Discovery Complete. Every valid site comparison has been plotted.")
```
